title: Wealth Management Trainee
description:
Why Mizuho

At Mizuho Securities Singapore, our greatest asset is our people, and we are committed to promoting a vibrant and supportive environment full of opportunities. Just like our global client and customer base, our people come from diverse backgrounds and our success is supported by our creativity, teamwork, and collective abilities as individuals to exceed the dynamic needs of our customers.

We provide the stability of an international industry leader with the career trajectory of a growing business. Our strategic growth gives our people at all levels rewarding degrees of responsibility and a richer work experience than a boutique firm or an established giant could offer alone. With a focus on growing and expanding our platform across Asia, we are committed to attracting, hiring, retaining, and rewarding the best-in-class talent.


Job Description

As a trainee of the wealth management team, you will be work well with other team members and assist them to pursue the team goals in terms of client acquisition, client maintenance, client documentation, and any other supporting roles.


Responsibilities

  • Support all tasks/activities needed within the wealth management team
  • Partner with the team to achieve ultimate goal of the team
  • Help to create documents in English, Japanese, and possibly Chinese for client and for internal meetings
  • Coordinate with affiliate entities of Mizuho group globally
  • To attend client meetings with team members


Role Prerequisites

  • Minimum 2 years of experience in private banking
  • Ability to complete necessary analysis and to create documentations related to clients’ account
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office products with advanced knowledge of financial analysis required
  • Ability to foster and maintain an initial level of wealth management relationship with high level of competency
  • Able to communicate clearly with the team and to work as a team
  • Speaking/writing fluency in English and Japanese is mandatory due to liaison with Japanese clients and internal stakeholders in Tokyo head office


Company Overview

As a leading Asia-focused investment bank, we provide corporate and institutional clients with unparalleled access and expertise in Japan and Asia. We are the partner of choice to many in the region, offering a wide range of investment banking and global markets solutions for the increasingly-sophisticated and technological needs of our large client base – primarily corporations, financial institutions, pensions, asset managers, and public sector entities.

Our parent company – Mizuho Financial Group – came together in late 2002, merging three of the largest banks in Japan and is today one of the world’s largest financial institutions. With our global presence and affiliates across Asia, Americas and EMEA, we’re able to meet local market needs with a combination of unique market insights, knowledge, and capabilities.

For more information about the Mizuho Financial Group, please visit: https://www.mizuhogroup.com

For more information about Mizuho Securities, please visit: https://www.mizuhogroup.com/securities

postedCompany.description:
The Mizuho Financial Group is a global financial services leader with offices in nearly 40 countries, approximately 60,000 employees, and assets of more than USD 1.8 trillion.  Mizuho provides expertise in retail banking, corporate finance, investment banking, asset management, capital markets, and sales and trading, to help businesses develop and find new opportunities for growth.


Within the Group, Mizuho Securities (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. (“MHSS”) is a Singapore-based group company of Mizuho Securities, part of the Mizuho Financial Group. MHSS is an established securities firm with over thirty years of history in Singapore. We offer many services, with an emphasis and expertise in futures clearing services, fixed income and equity sales, DCM, M&A advisory and wealth management. As a major subsidiary of the global Mizuho Securities firm, our focus is to serve customers in Southeast Asia, as well as the greater Asia-Pacific region. Ultimately, our goal is to provide our customers a world-class suite of services across both primary and secondary capital markets.


For more information about the Mizuho Financial Group, please visit: https://www.mizuho-fg.com/index.html

For more information about Mizuho Securities, please visit: https://www.mizuho-sc.com/english/
postedCompany.name: MIZUHO SECURITIES (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
